title: telemetry-otel — HTTP middleware
description: keepsuit handles the HTTP-server auto-instrumentation. We add two thin middleware for baggage propagation + span-attribute enrichment.

middleware.description: Extracts W3C Trace Context / B3 from inbound headers via keepsuit's propagator; joins existing trace if present, else starts a new root span. Adds academorix.request_id + academorix.workspace_id + academorix.workspace_id as span attributes.
Extracts W3C Baggage header + populates our RequestContext with (workspace_id, workspace_id, causer_id, org_id, branch_id). Used by downstream modules to correlate cross-service work.

notes: keepsuit's own middleware (Keepsuit\LaravelOpenTelemetry\Http\Middleware\TraceRequest) handles the raw span lifecycle. Our StartOrJoinTrace runs AFTER it, only to add academorix-specific attributes.
The bus middleware for queue propagation is registered via config — not exposed as an HTTP middleware alias.
